login_page.title: Login
login_page.description: Sign in to your account to continue

register_page.title: Register
register_page.description: Create an account to get started with our platform and enjoy all the features.

page.title: Profile
page.description: View and manage your profile information, social links, and platform preferences.

page.title: Profile Settings
page.description: Update your personal information, social links, and platform preferences.

profile_info.title: Profile Information
profile_info.description: Update your photo and personal details visible on the platform.

form.bio_placeholder: Tell us a little about yourself...

avatar.description: JPG, GIF or PNG. Max size of 2MB.

social_links.title: Social Accounts
social_links.description: Link your profiles so other students and mentors can find your work.

preferences.title: Platform Preferences
preferences.description: Manage how you want to receive alerts and code review updates.

review_notifs.label: Code Review Notifications
review_notifs.description: Receive instant alerts when a mentor checks your task.

email_marketing.label: Email Digests & Marketing
email_marketing.description: Get weekly summaries of your progress and platform updates.

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.description: Irreversible actions for your platform account.

delete_account.label: Delete Account
delete_account.description: Permanently remove your profile, subscription details, and all completed course progress.

modal.title: Are you absolutely sure?
modal.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all your data from our servers.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: Manage and sign out of your active sessions on other browsers and devices.
sessions.sign_out_all_other: Sign Out of All Other Devices

security.title: Security Settings
security.description: Manage your account security settings, including password changes and two-factor authentication.

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.description: Update your account password to enhance security.

two_factor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
two_factor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account by requiring more than just a password.

app_email_codes.label: Enable Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
app_email_codes.description: Secure your account with 2FA verification codes sent to your device or email.

invalid_username.min_length: Username must be at least 4 characters long.

client.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.

invalid_password.min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

server.unknown_error: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
server.network_error: Network error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
server.invalid_credentials_error: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.
server.unauthorized_error: You are not authorized. Please log in to your account.
server.user_already_exists: An account with this email address already exists.
server.user_not_found: No account found with this email address.
server.invalid_file_type: Invalid file type. Please upload a JPG, GIF, or PNG image.
server.file_too_large: File size exceeds the limit. Please upload an image smaller than 2MB.
server.avatar_upload_failed: Failed to upload avatar. Please try again.
server.account_delete_failed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
server.sessions_clear_failed: Failed to sign out of other devices. Please try again.

auth.success_login: You have successfully logged in to your account.
auth.success_logout: You have successfully logged out of your account.

profile.account_delete_success: Your account has been permanently deleted.
profile.sessions_clear_success: Successfully signed out of all other devices.

username.min_length: Username must be at least 3 characters long.

bio.min_length: Bio must be at least 3 characters long.
